summary: Journey page header restyling to match SupportPod - ALL 12 TESTS PASSED. Header now uses <header> tag with bg-white/95 border-b border-gray-100 matching SupportPod exactly. All elements verified: back link, separator, school name styling, subtext format, match badge, compare/archive buttons, health badge with Activity icon, PrimaryHeroCard with Send CTA, signal chips.
critical_code_review_comments: JourneyPage.js Lines 518-631: Header implementation matches SupportPod.js Lines 256-321 exactly
Header uses <header> tag (semantic HTML) with bg-white/95 border-b border-gray-100
Back link: ← Pipeline with ArrowLeft icon, navigates to /pipeline
Vertical separator: h-5 w-px bg-gray-200 between back link and avatar
School name: font-semibold text-gray-900 text-sm sm:text-base
Subtext: D1 · Conference · X interactions in text-gray-500
Match badge: teal-50 pill with text-teal-600
Icon buttons: w-3.5 h-3.5 icons for compare/archive with hover:bg-gray-100
Health badge: colored dot (hot=red, warm=amber, active=teal, default=gray) + Activity icon
PrimaryHeroCard preserved with dark background and Send CTA
